title: RegionData
description: A single administrative region published by a country worker to the geodata RabbitMQ exchange. This is the contract between workers (Python) and the backend (NestJS). Both sides must conform to this schema. Do not add country-specific fields.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, e.g. BR, US, AR

region_type.description: The administrative division type used by this country

region_code.description: Short code for the region, e.g. SP, CA, BA

region_name.description: Full display name of the region in its native language

source.description: Primary data source name, e.g. IBGE, Census Bureau, INDEC

scraped_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the data was scraped

indicators.description: Map of indicator key to IndicatorValue. Keys must come from the shared vocabulary in CLAUDE.md section 13.

unit.description: Unit of measurement, e.g. people, %, USD, beds/1k

source.description: Specific source citation, e.g. IBGE Census 2022
